channel.title: GitHub Swift Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: nikitabobko/AeroSpace
item.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS

item.title: exelban/stats
item.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

item.title: AugustDev/enchanted
item.description: Enchanted is iOS and macOS app for chatting with private self hosted language models such as Llama2, Mistral or Vicuna using Ollama.

item.title: Whisky-App/Whisky
item.description: A modern Wine wrapper for macOS built with SwiftUI

item.title: airbnb/lottie-ios
item.description: An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: SDWebImage/SDWebImageSwiftUI
item.description: SwiftUI Image loading and Animation framework powered by SDWebImage

item.title: lihaoyun6/QuickRecorder
item.description: A lightweight screen recorder based on ScreenCapture Kit for macOS / 基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量化多功能 macOS 录屏工具

item.title: ninxsoft/Mist
item.description: A Mac utility that automatically downloads macOS Firmwares / Installers.

item.title: SwifterSwift/SwifterSwift
item.description: A handy collection of more than 500 native Swift extensions to boost your productivity.

item.title: macmade/Hot
item.description: Hot is macOS menu bar application that displays the CPU speed limit due to thermal issues.
